title: Shinobi No Mono 2: Vengeance
actors: Raizô Ichikawa, Sô Yamamura, Shiho Fujimura
plot: Confident that he has destroyed the Iga Ninja, the evil Oda Nobunaga continues his quest to conquer Japan. Meanwhile, Ishikawa Goemon (Ichikawa Raizo) has settled down with his wife and child, and wishes only to live in peace -- a...
